title: IONCatalogLocalization
description: Localised text fields for catalog content — name, short description, long description. All three use the LocalisedText pattern. These extend beckn:descriptor fields with proper multilingual support.

name.description: Product or service name as a language object. Supplements Beckn `Descriptor.name` (which carries the default-locale text, normally `id`). Consumers that read only Beckn-native fields see Indonesian; ION-aware consumers read the multilingual map here. "id" always mandatory.
name.x-ion-regulatory: ION Network Policy — Bahasa Indonesia localisation requirement

shortDesc.description: Short description for catalog listings and search results. Max 150 characters per language. Supplements Beckn `Descriptor.shortDesc`. "id" mandatory.
shortDesc.x-ion-regulatory: ION Network Policy — bilingual catalog requirement

longDesc.description: Full product description for product detail page. Supplements Beckn `Descriptor.longDesc`. "id" mandatory. "en" mandatory for cross-border pattern.
longDesc.x-ion-regulatory: ION Network Policy — Bahasa Indonesia localisation requirement
